_comment: Maps Q4 headache answers to specialist agents the client's bots should prioritize. Used to customize SOUL.md priority_agents and the SAMPLE-WEEK.md deep-dive recommendation.

not_enough_customers.first_week_action: Map 3 untapped acquisition channels + draft a 7-post content sprint targeting your highest-intent customer profile.
not_enough_customers.day14_deep_dive: Full audience + acquisition audit: which channel has the lowest CPA for your customer LTV, and 3 tested-elsewhere hooks to try.

no_conversion.first_week_action: Run a conversion audit on your highest-traffic page + identify the 3 biggest objections you're not addressing.
no_conversion.day14_deep_dive: Full funnel teardown: heatmap signals, copy gaps, friction points. Deliver 5 specific changes ranked by expected conversion lift.

social_overwhelm.human_label: I can't keep up with social media / content
social_overwhelm.first_week_action: Build a 14-day content calendar in your voice across all your platforms + draft the first 7 posts for approval.
social_overwhelm.day14_deep_dive: Establish a sustainable content rhythm: which 2 platforms matter most for your business, what posting cadence is realistic, what types of content to never bother making.

ads_not_working.first_week_action: Audit current ad accounts for tracking health + wasted spend. Identify which campaigns to pause TODAY.
ads_not_working.day14_deep_dive: Full paid media restructure: new creative concepts based on competitor intel, audience refinement, bid strategy review, and 5 specific tests to run.

ops_chaos.first_week_action: Inventory all your tools + systems. Identify the 5 things eating most of your time and which ones can be automated or delegated.
ops_chaos.day14_deep_dive: Operations restructure: define what YOU should do vs delegate vs automate, build standard operating procedures for the top 5 recurring tasks.

losing_customers.human_label: I'm losing customers I worked hard to win
losing_customers.first_week_action: Audit your retention email flows + identify the 3 biggest reasons customers churn (look at your last 20 cancellations).
losing_customers.day14_deep_dive: Build a retention engine: winback sequence, value-add nurture series, NPS feedback loop, and a churn early-warning system.

no_competitor_intel.human_label: I have no idea what competitors are doing
no_competitor_intel.first_week_action: Map your top 5 competitors + set up daily scans of their ads, pricing, new products, and content.
no_competitor_intel.day14_deep_dive: Full competitive landscape: positioning map, 3 unclaimed angles you could own, and 5 specific moves competitors are making that you should respond to.

unclear_finances.human_label: I can't tell if I'm actually making money
unclear_finances.first_week_action: Build a one-page weekly financial dashboard (revenue, COGS, ad spend, net) + identify your true unit economics.
unclear_finances.day14_deep_dive: Full P&L analysis with bot-driven insights: where money is actually going, which products are profitable vs loss leaders, and 3 financial decisions to make this month.
